user.title: BMW Motorrad ConnectedRide
user.description: Enter the BMW CarData client ID and Motorrad endpoint settings.

authorize.title: Authorize device
authorize.description: Open {verification_uri_complete} (or {verification_uri}), enter the user code {user_code} if needed, approve the device, then submit this step.

error.cannot_connect: Could not request a device code from BMW.
error.authorize_failed: Device authorization was not completed or the Motorrad endpoint rejected the token.

abort.already_configured: This client ID is already configured.
